Headline check list…
- Proof and credibility (Harvard, Fox News, Warren
Buffet, # of customers, # of studies)
- Specific Benefits (set up your first funnel, drop 8 lbs
in two weeks, make $300 in a weekend)
- Curiosity (Amazon jungle blood pressure secret,
Forbidden Fruit, secret IRS loophole, aging in
reverse)
- Story (Why did Fox News rush to get this Doctor on
TV?) -
- Some type of juxtaposition (think you can only get
$1200 a month from SS? Wrong? Here’s how you
can get $1700 a month)
Note: Most importantly, you don’t want to trigger their
feeling of “I’ve heard this before”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
